title: Information Technology Project Managers
description: Plan, initiate, and manage information technology (IT) projects. Lead and guide the work of technical staff. Serve as liaison between business and technical aspects of projects. Plan project stages and assess business implications for each stage. Monitor progress to assure deadlines, standards, and cost targets are met.

tasks.text: Manage project execution to ensure adherence to budget, schedule, and scope.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with project personnel to identify and resolve problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor or track project milestones and deliverables.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Submit project deliverables, ensuring adherence to quality standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assess current or future customer needs and priorities by communicating directly with customers, conducting surveys, or other methods.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Initiate, review, or approve modifications to project plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Schedule and facilitate meetings related to information technology projects.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct or coordinate activities of project personnel.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop implementation plans that include analyses such as cost-benefit or return on investment (ROI).
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify need for initial or supplemental project resources.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop or update project plans for information technology projects including information such as project objectives, technologies, systems, information specifications, schedules, funding, and staffing.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform risk assessments to develop response strategies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare project status reports by collecting, analyzing, and summarizing information and trends.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify, review, or select vendors or consultants to meet project needs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop and manage annual budgets for information technology projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish and execute a project communication plan.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop and manage work breakdown structure (WBS) of information technology projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor the performance of project team members, providing and documenting performance feedback.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate recruitment or selection of project personnel.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assign duties, responsibilities, and spans of authority to project personnel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Negotiate with project stakeholders or suppliers to obtain resources or materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
